description: Resolve all scheduling conflicts, coverage gaps, and dietary violations in the community meal train spreadsheet to ensure 14 consecutive days of vegetarian meals for a recovering neighbor.

natural_language.prompt: Review the meal train signup spreadsheet for Sarah's surgery recovery. She needs 14 consecutive days (March 1-14, 2025) of vegetarian dinners. Identify and resolve: duplicate date assignments, missing dates, and meals containing meat. Add analysis columns to flag issues and ensure complete coverage.
